vllm.title: [Model] support input image embedding for minicpmv
vllm.author: whyiug
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Follow-up to #6613.
Achieving consistency in multi-image input formats across different multimodal models is challenging. To address this, I adopted a dictionary-based approach to append additional parameters.
I have tested both multi-image and batch inference locally, and the full script is provide

vllm.title: [OpenVINO] Use torch 2.4.0 and newer optimim version
vllm.author: ilya-lavrenov
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
As was asked there #8932 (comment), OpenVINO needs explicitly state that 2.4.0 torch is used (even we had wider range of supported versions on current vLLM main).
Secondly, use latest optimum and optimum-intel to support latest transformer versions.
Related to #8932
Closes #9092
BEFORE SUBMITTING, P

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix Machete unittests failing with `NotImplementedError`
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
After #8845
pytest tests/kernels/test_machete_gemm.py::test_machete_all_schedules

started failing due to machete_supported_schedules being registered for CUDA despite having no tensor args (so the dispatcher doesn't know how to dispatch it), fixed this by moving its dispatch key back to CatchAll

vllm.title: [Doc] Improve debugging documentation
vllm.author: rafvasq
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR tries to improve the existing documentation for general debugging.

Link to searching/opening issues
Move reminder to deactivate debug env vars to top of doc
Splitting and reorganizing topics using headers
Improve readability

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Make the `Dockerfile.cpu` file's  `PIP_EXTRA_INDEX_URL` Configurable as a Build Argument
vllm.author: jyono
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Currently, the Dockerfile.cpu only supports "https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu" as the PIP_EXTRA_INDEX_URL. This is problematic for folks who need to get their pytorch whl from a mirror registry or another artifact store. I am making "https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu" the default, but now use

vllm.title: Suggest codeowners for the core componenets
vllm.author: simon-mo
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR adds owners for some critical parts of the code that requires careful review.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] integration with compilation control
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
closes #8821
this pr defines the way we integrate torch.compile . Some features of vLLM are not tested yet, so I just put the functionality under a test flag VLLM_TEST_TORCH_COMPILE_LEVEL .
the user-facing flags are:



Usage
CompilationLevel
how vLLM uses Dynamo
how vLLM uses Inductor
use vLLM's cu

vllm.title: [ci/build] Add placeholder command for custom models test and add comments
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The test has been run accidentally a few times so a comment is added here to make it clear that it's used only for testing invidividual model during PR development phase, should not be merged and tested on main.

vllm.title: [Doc][Neuron] add note to neuron documentation about resolving triton issue
vllm.author: omrishiv
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FILL IN THE PR DESCRIPTION HERE
Neuron currently uses torch version 2.1.0, which has a dependency on an older version of triton. This PR adds a note to the documentation for resolving an error using this dependency with newer versions of vLLM.
FIX #7166 (link existing issues this PR will resolve)
